body: While looking at the logs of one of the CMIP run, I noticed that `get_field` for `ice_thickness` being overwritten during precompilation. This PR removes this duplicated function.
title: Remove duplicated get_field for ice_thickness

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
These experiments have diverged a lot from the ClimaCoupler design over the years. Right now they don't use the ClimaCoupler interface at all, so they aren't very helpful examples as part of the package, and if anything they distract from the current ClimaCoupler usage.

If we want to have something like this showing coupling of simpler models, we can add a coupled setup that does use the ClimaCoupler interface.

Closes #1066

## To-do
- [x] delete `experiments/ClimaCore/`
- [x] remove seabreeze, heat diffusion examples from CI
- [x] update docs


## Content
